_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py + benchmark_latency.py). Single source of truth: scripts/make_figures.py reads this file. IMPORTANT distinction: the REAL-TIME deployable config is a single model (<40ms CPU) scoring 0.651; the OFFLINE max config adds cross-grid ensembling + TTA to reach 0.675 but is NOT real-time.

real_time.config: single g192_ctx model on all sensors (test_ctx) — one forward pass/window

offline.config: router: EVK4 -> cross-grid ensemble; DAVIS/DVX -> temporal model + TTA (router_ctta)

best_config: OFFLINE max: router_ctta (0.675). REAL-TIME deployed: single g192_ctx (0.651).
latency_note: Deployed real-time config: single g192_ctx (grid-192, ctx=3), laptop CPU, streaming (batch=1) -> 15-19 ms/window, well under 40ms. TTA/ensemble variants (0.675) are offline only (~48-180ms).
